name: @orqastudio/plugin-githooks
description: Pre-commit enforcement via git hooks — schema validation, filename-to-ID match, relationship integrity. Schema-driven: reads validation rules from installed plugin manifests.

enforcement_mechanisms.description: Git pre-commit hook — final gate before commit. Validates governance artifacts against plugin schemas, filename-to-ID match, relationship integrity.
Git post-commit hook — auto-pushes to remote after every commit.
